full_text:
Cao Chan 曹闡
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Cao Chan (曹闡). Replaced his deceased brother as Cao Zheng’s descendant. Cao Chan was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom.
